messages.subject: [R-jobs] Text Mining and Natural Language Processing Analyst (with skills in R )
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Text Mining and Natural Language Processing Analyst (with skills in R )
messages.body_plain:
Hello useRs,
My group is looking for someone with the following requirements :

Primary Skills:
- Knowledge of Text Mining and Natural Language Processing
- Great R programming skills
- Awareness of Open Source tools and technologies
- Secondary skills in Python

Do get in touch with Harsh (singhalblr at gmail.com) if you consider your
experience and skills a good fit for the above role.
Location: Bangalore, India

Thanks
Harsh

messages.subject: [R-jobs] job openings
messages.body_plain:
L.S.

OpenAnalytics is an international company providing data analysis 
services and products across geographies and industrial sectors.

We are currently looking to extend our team with the following two profiles

* Data analyst: MSc / PhD in computational biology or molecular
   biology with a keen interest in data analysis

* Statistician: MSc / PhD in statistics, biostatistics or applied
   mathematics interested to work on applied modeling problems

Detailed descriptions can be found at

http://www.openanalytics.eu/careers.html

Strong R skills are an important asset for the positions.

Kind regards,
Tobias

-- 

Tobias Verbeke
Manager

OpenAnalytics BVBA
Kortestraat 30A
2220 Heist-op-den-Berg
Belgium

E tobias.verbeke at openanalytics.eu
M +32 499 36 33 15

http://www.openanalytics.eu

messages.subject: [R-jobs] Bioinformatics Position with Large Pharmaceutical in New Jersey
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Bioinformatics Position with Large Pharmaceutical in New Jersey
messages.body_plain:
I currently have an opening with a large Pharmaceutical company in New Jersey. If you have any interest please contact Christina Kinchen at 800-684-9921 ext 220 or 407-548-0670 email: Ckinchen at smithhanley.com. We also have a great referral program if you know of anyone who is a fit. Please feel free to contact me with any questions.

Job Details:
--3+ years' bioinformatics research experience / sequencing analysis and statistical assessment for HLA typing systems,
--MUST be strong in genomics / genetics background a must,
--Degree Requirement: Masters in Bioinformatics w/ 3+ yrs' industry exp or PhD in Bioinformatics w/ no experience or MS in Computer Science or Biology w/ 3+ yrs' industry exp,
--Expert in Perl, R, database skills,
--MySQL and shell scripting a plus,
--Work experience with HLA typing systems a strong plus,
--Want highly motivated individual to join Bioinformatics Team in newly-funded business unit program.



***********************************************************************************
Christina Beuchert Kinchen
Senior Recruiter
Smith Hanley Consulting Group, LLC
an inVentiv Health Company (NASDAQ:VTIV)
accelerate results
www.smithhanleyconsulting.com
"Ask About Our Referral Policy"
1st Placement- $1000
2nd Placement-$2000
3rd Placement-$3000

To View open positions go to: http://www.smithhanleyconsulting.com/pharma/candidates/search_jobs.asp

-Specializing in contract placement of Statisticians, SAS Programmers, Clinical Data Managers/Data Coordinators, and other clinical professionals throughout the US.

Phone 800-684-9921 ext 80670
Direct Line 407-548-0670
Fax 888-513-4285
E-Mail: ckinchen at smithhanley.com
Website: www.smithhanleyconsulting.com
